description: Migrated log:write IPC channel from raw ipcMain.handle() to safeHandle() with structured validation, module allowlist, and rate limiting

evidence.description: 31 new passing tests for log:write validator (27) and rate limiter (4)
pnpm typecheck passes with no errors

changes.change: Added log:write validator with level/message/module/context checks, RENDERER_MODULE_ALLOWLIST, isAllowedRendererModule(), token-bucket rate limiter (checkLogRateLimit)
Replaced ipcMain.handle('log:write') with safeHandle('log:write') + validateIpc + checkLogRateLimit; removed isLogEntry() and LOG_LEVELS
Added 27 validator tests and 4 rate limiter tests
